2. Fill: Project, Artisan, Trade, Description, Days Required, Start Date, Daily Rate
3. Submit
Expected Result: Request created; Total Amount auto-calculated (Days × Rate)

Test Steps:
1. Click Edit
2. Modify days and rate
3. Submit
Expected Result: Request updated; total recalculated
Request removed
Status changes to Submitted
